title: Horror but Guns
description: A terrifying horror experience powered by TACZ weapons and optimized shaders. Don't just hide—hunt the monsters.
body:
# 🌑 Horror But With Guns: The Hunter's Awakening
"In the shadows, you were once the prey. Now, you are the nightmare."
You quickly realize that survival isn't just about hiding anymore. To survive the entities lurking in the dark, you must arm yourself. High-tech weaponry and strategic combat are your only hope against the legends of the night. That's where your story begins.

# 🔥 Key Features
🔫 Advanced Arsenal - Featuring the legendary Timeless and Classics Zero (TACZ) along with its best addons. Experience realistic 3D guns, smooth animations, and heavy firepower.

👹 The Legends of Horror - Face off against terrifying entities like The Goatman, The Boiled One, and The Knocker. These aren't your average monsters; they are smart, fast, and deadly.

⚔️ Stop Running, Start Hunting - This pack is designed to make you the controller. With the right gear, you can take the fight to the monsters.

🧠 Strategic Survival - Even with guns, some monsters are too powerful for a direct head-on collision. You must decide: When to fight, and when to run for your life.

✨ Stunning Visuals - Highly optimized shaders provide a dark, moody atmosphere without needing a high-end PC. Stay safe while enjoying a fancy horror experience.

🛠️ Maximum Performance - Carefully selected mods to ensure your game runs smoothly even during the most intense combat encounters.

🧟 Meet the Nightmares
Are you ready to face what's waiting for you in the trees?

The Goatman: He's watching your every move.

The Boiled One: A presence that chills your very soul.

The Knocker: Don't open the door... unless you have your TACZ rifle ready.

# ⚠️ A Final Warning
Stay alert, stay armed, and most importantly... Stay safe. The hunter can easily become the hunted if you get too comfortable.


# 🛠️ Why Download This Pack?
Unlike traditional horror packs that leave you defenseless, this pack focuses on the thrill of Combat-Horror. It’s the perfect balance between fear and action.


#                                      ⚠️ IMPORTANT ⚠️

> If the **Beds** are invisible or not showing up, please do the following:
> 1. Go to **Video Settings**.
> 2. Open **Performance** settings.
> 3. Turn **OFF** the **Fast Beds** option.

> ## 🔦 **TORCH FIX**
> If the **Torches** are invisible or don't show any light/fire, you need to:
> * **Delete** or **Disable** the mod named: `AsyncParticles`
> * This will fix the rendering issue and make torches visible again!

> ## 🌑 **FOR BETTER EXPERIENCE**
> To make the game truly terrifying, please change your lighting settings:
> 1. Go to **Video Settings**.
> 2. Look for the **Darkness** settings.
> 3. Change the mode from **Vanilla** to **Darkness** or **Blackness**.
> *Warning: It will be pitch black! Use your torches wisely.* 🔦


### enjoy
